divisions.title: Prologue and Witness
divisions.summary: The eternal Word, John the Baptist's testimony, and the calling of the first disciples

divisions.title: Discourses
divisions.summary: Water to wine, cleansing temple, Nicodemus, Samaritan woman, healings, bread of life, light of the world, good shepherd, raising Lazarus

divisions.title: Final Week and Teaching
divisions.summary: Triumphal entry, foot washing, farewell discourse, the vine and branches, and the high priestly prayer

divisions.title: Passion
divisions.summary: Arrest in the garden, trials before Annas, Caiaphas, and Pilate, and crucifixion

divisions.title: Resurrection
divisions.summary: Empty tomb, appearances to Mary and disciples, doubting Thomas, and restoration of Peter

chapterSummaries.1: The Word became flesh, John's testimony, calling of first disciples
chapterSummaries.2: Wedding at Cana, water to wine, cleansing the temple
chapterSummaries.3: Nicodemus visits Jesus, teaching on being born again and God's love
chapterSummaries.4: The Samaritan woman at the well, healing the official's son
chapterSummaries.5: Healing at the pool of Bethesda, Jesus' authority and testimony
chapterSummaries.6: Feeding the five thousand, walking on water, bread of life discourse
chapterSummaries.7: Jesus at the Feast of Tabernacles, division among the people
chapterSummaries.8: Woman caught in adultery, Jesus the light of the world, truth sets free
chapterSummaries.9: Jesus heals a man born blind, Pharisees investigate
chapterSummaries.10: The good shepherd, Jesus claims to be one with the Father
chapterSummaries.11: Raising of Lazarus, plot to kill Jesus
chapterSummaries.12: Mary anoints Jesus, triumphal entry, Jesus predicts his death
chapterSummaries.13: Jesus washes disciples' feet, predicts betrayal, new commandment to love
chapterSummaries.14: I am the way, truth, and life; promise of the Holy Spirit
chapterSummaries.15: The vine and the branches, love one another, the world's hatred
chapterSummaries.16: Work of the Holy Spirit, sorrow will turn to joy, I have overcome the world
chapterSummaries.17: Jesus prays for himself, his disciples, and all believers
chapterSummaries.18: Arrest in the garden, trial before Annas and Caiaphas, Peter's denial
chapterSummaries.19: Trial before Pilate, crucifixion, death, and burial of Jesus
chapterSummaries.20: Empty tomb, Jesus appears to Mary, disciples, and Thomas
chapterSummaries.21: Jesus appears at the Sea of Galilee, restoration of Peter, epilogue
